examples: A planeload of guests arrived on the night of April 21st.
Canada has welcomed its first planeload of Syrian refugees.
Thousands of passengers were left stranded and one planeload of unfortunates spent eight hours sitting on the tarmac, with precious little food or drink to sustain them.
On Thursday, a planeload of troops from the 101st Airborne Division arrived home in Kentucky.
Desks are unmanned, or close just as a planeload of people arrives.
